commands.review_summary:
The PR separates raw assistant progress from final assistant completion semantics, uses progress to arm the post-tool terminal guard, and adds a commentary-phase raw assistant regression test.

PR surface: Source +7, Tests +93. Total +100 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main excludes commentary from the raw assistant completion predicate while using that predicate for the post-tool guard, so the reported commentary path falls back to the shorter completion-idle guard. I did not execute tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The code change is narrow, but merge should wait for contributor or maintainer after-fix proof and explicit acceptance of the longer post-tool stall window.

target.title: fix(codex): guard post-tool commentary progress
target.body:
## Summary
- Treat post-tool raw assistant commentary/progress messages as activity that needs the conservative post-tool terminal guard.
- Keep commentary excluded from final-answer release semantics.
- Add a regression for the topic 2728 failure shape: a post-tool `phase: commentary` raw assistant message followed by quiet time.

## Validation
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check extensions/codex/src/app-server/attempt-notifications.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/attempt-notification-state.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.turn-watches.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm tsgo:extensions`
- `pnpm exec vitest run extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.turn-watches.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec vitest run extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.turn-watches.test.ts -t "uses the post-tool timeout for commentary raw assistant progress"`

Live evidence: Telegram topic 2728 timed out at 2026-05-30 05:45:20 IST after raw assistant commentary `I’m editing app.js...`; watchdog used `timeoutMs: 60000` instead of the post-tool 300000ms guard.
target.author: keshavbotagent
